scripts.export:images:
mkdir -p images && <<< $'16
32
48
128' xargs -I@ rsvg-convert -w @ -h @ public/repub.svg -o images/repub_@.png
scripts.export:bundle: bun build src/background.ts src/offscreen.ts src/popup.ts --outdir . --sourcemap=linked && bun build ./options.html --outdir out --sourcemap=linked --chunk-naming "[name].[ext]" --asset-naming "[name].[ext]"
scripts.export:pack: zip -r --filesync repub.zip background.js background.js.map images/*.png manifest.json offscreen.html popup.html popup.js popup.js.map offscreen.js offscreen.js.map out
scripts.export: bun export:images && bun export:bundle && bun export:pack
scripts.pack: bun lint && bun test --coverage && bun export && publint
